ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization problem */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the problem was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the problem */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the problem belongs to */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of the problem (e.g., logistics, finance) */,
  "problem_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES problem_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, industry professional) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the user (e.g., optimization, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_solutions" (
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem solved */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used */,
  "is_md" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the problem is a MD (Mathematical Design) problem */,
  "is_ddd" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the problem is a DDD (Design, Develop, Deploy) problem */,
  "bp_explored" INTEGER /* Number of base problems explored */,
  "run_time" INTEGER /* Run-time of the algorithm */,
  "add_run_time" INTEGER /* Additional run-time parameters */,
  "sp_run_time" INTEGER /* Special run-time parameters */,
  "num_arcs" INTEGER /* Number of arcs in the solution */,
  "num_subpaths" INTEGER /* Number of subpaths in the solution */,
  "opt_obj" REAL /* Optimal objective value achieved */,
  "solution_status" TEXT /* Status of the solution (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_solutions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_solutions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization problem category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the problem file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., csv, pdf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_files_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solution_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the solution file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., csv, pdf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solution_files_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES problem_solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem accessed */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the problem or solution */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the problem or solution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES problem_solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration event */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being collaborated on */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration occurred */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., contributor, reviewer) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the user to the collaboration (e.g., code, feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES problem_solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem analyzed in the report */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution analyzed in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance analysis, comparison) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "generate_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES problem_solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solution_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solution_metrics_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES problem_solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_tags_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)
